name: GardeNet
intro: A gardening companion that helps you plan, track, and care for your plants — and earn rewards as your green world grows.
contentHtml:
Discovery

Explore a living feed of gardening inspiration — popular posts, gardening tips, plant clinic advice, home-decor plant ideas and kitchen-garden guides, all curated for green thumbs of every level.

Community & Q&A

Share your garden with people who care about the same things. Post to the community, ask questions, and get answers from fellow gardeners and plant lovers around the world.

My Garden & My Rewards

Plan and track your own garden, log your plants' progress, and earn rewards as your green world grows — gardening feels even better when it pays off.

My Plant & Plant Care

Keep every plant healthy with tailored care reminders — watering, fertilizing, repotting — plus a full care history for each plant in your collection.

name: eChicShop
intro: A shopping experience built around discovery and delight — bringing people and products together in one connected space.
contentHtml: eChicShop is our shopping experience built around discovery and delight. Instead of endless search results, eChicShop brings you curated picks and a community of people whose taste you trust — bringing people and products together in one connected space.
